hooks.command: echo '[fofafu] Session start — read vault/protocols/dispatch.md before delegating. All work flows through /dispatch.'

hooks._scheduled_sanity_checks_NOTE: Real schedules are added via /schedule (CronCreate) once Phase 2 has measurable runtimes. Until then these are intent stubs documenting cadence.

engineering.description: tsc --noEmit, eslint, vitest. Failures → features/ with #bug tag, card on engineering Backlog.

design.description: axe-core, design-token drift, visual diff vs baseline. Findings → design Backlog cards.

marketing.description: link checker, README/CHANGELOG freshness, SEO meta validation. Findings → marketing Backlog cards.
